title: poa cenisia var. badensis
intro: Poa cenisia var. badensis, also known as Mountain Timothy or Baden Timothy, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to soothe digestive issues and relieve inflammation. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system. Poa cenisia var. badensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
